item.title: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.
item.description: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.

item.title: 👍💵Emily Brice - Northwest Health Law Advocates
item.description: Emily Brice signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Northwest Health Law Advocates. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Madeleine Foutch - SEIU 775
item.description: Madeleine Foutch signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent SEIU 775. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Sam Hatzenbeler - Economic Opportunity Institute
item.description: Sam Hatzenbeler signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Economic Opportunity Institute.

item.title: 👎💵Rose Feliciano - TechNet
item.description: Rose Feliciano signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent TechNet. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎💵Molly Pfaffenroth - Washington Food Industry Association
item.description: Molly Pfaffenroth signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Washington Food Industry Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Andy Harding - Economic Opportunity Institute
item.description: Andy Harding signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍Thomas Kennedy - Whole Washington
item.description: Thomas Kennedy signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Whole Washington.

item.title: 👎💵Amber Carter - Washington Retail Association
item.description: Amber Carter signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Washington Retail Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎💵Andrea Reay - Washington Hospitality Association
item.description: Andrea Reay signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Washington Hospitality Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓Len Mc Comb - WASHINGTON STATE HOSPITAL ASOCIATION
item.description: Len Mc Comb signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent WASHINGTON STATE HOSPITAL ASOCIATION.

item.title: 👍Steven Field - Whole Washington
item.description: Steven Field signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍Shazia Anwar - Whole Washington
item.description: Shazia Anwar signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍💵Sean Graham - Washington State Medical Association
item.description: Sean Graham signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Medical Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎Max Martin - Association of Washington Business
item.description: Max Martin signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Business.

item.title: 👍💵Carissa Larsen - Washington State Labor Council, AFL-CIO
item.description: Carissa Larsen signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Labor Council, AFL-CIO. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍MSLS,BSN, RN, Kathryn Lewandowsky - Washington State Labor Council, AFL-CIO
item.description: MSLS,BSN, RN, Kathryn Lewandowsky signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍Jim Freeburg - Patient Coalition of Washington
item.description: Jim Freeburg signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Patient Coalition of Washington.

item.title: 👍Kevin Wren - T1International Washington #insulin4all
item.description: Kevin Wren signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent T1International Washington #insulin4all.

item.title: 👍Andre Stackhouse - Healthcare consumer, voter, taxpayer
item.description: Andre Stackhouse signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Healthcare consumer, voter, taxpayer.

item.title: The Walmart tax
item.description: News article "The Walmart tax" from The Washington Observer.

item.title: WA Democrats drop push for business tax to cover Medicaid costs • Washington State Standard
item.description: News article "WA Democrats drop push for business tax to cover Medicaid costs • Washington State Standard" from Washington State Standard.

item.title: Wrapping up the 2026 Legislative Session - Sen. Emily Alvarado
item.description: News article "Wrapping up the 2026 Legislative Session - Sen. Emily Alvarado" from Senate Democrats.
